name: anki-prep
description: Personal spaced-repetition app for SWE interview prep

scripts.server: UV_CACHE_DIR=.uv-cache uv run --project server_py python -m uvicorn app:app --app-dir server_py --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run server" "npm run client"
scripts.start: UV_CACHE_DIR=.uv-cache uv run --project server_py python -m uvicorn app:app --app-dir server_py --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000
